name: init-db-run-as-module
tags: init_db scripts setup module run uv python path import src
body:
scripts/init_db.py must be run as a module, not as a script:

  uv run python -m scripts.init_db   ✓
  uv run python scripts/init_db.py  ✗  (ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'src')

**Why:** The script imports from src.* which requires the repo root on sys.path. Running as `-m scripts.init_db` from the repo root adds the CWD to sys.path automatically; running as a script path does not.

**How to apply:** Same rule applies to any script in scripts/ that imports from src/ or langchain_learning/.
